LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA INSTITUTE OF INTEGRAL STUDIES' MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS OFF CALENDAR. PLAINTIFFS FILED AN AMENDED COMPLAINT WHILE THE MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT WAS PENDING THAT RENDERS THE MOTION MOOT. SEE STATE COMPENSATION INSURANCE FUND V. SUP. CRT. (2010) 184 CAL.APP.4TH 1124, 1130. THIS RULING IS WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO DEFENDANT FILING A NEW MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT DIRECTED TO THE OPERATIVE COMPLAINT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Sep-19-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA INSTITUTE OF INTEGRAL STUDIES' MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is off calendar. Plaintiffs filed an amended complaint while the motion for summary judgment was pending that renders the motion moot. See State Compensation Insurance Fund v. Sup. Crt. (2010) 184 Cal.App.4th 1124, 1130. This ruling is without prejudice to defendant filing a new motion for summary judgment directed to the operative complaint. Judge: Marla J.
